philosophy.name: Maxwell Lord Beneficent Philosophy
philosophy.quote: Project LUMINA is great, but it can be better!
philosophy.source: Pedro Pascal as Maxwell Lord in 'Wonder Woman 1984'

acknowledge_current_state.description: Recognize what's working well before improving

beneficent_implementation.description: Improve without compromising stability or ethics

never_go_off_rails.description: Unlike the movie, maintain system integrity

orchestration.philosophy: This workflow is good, but it can be better!

coordination.philosophy: This integration works, but it can be better!

monitoring.philosophy: This monitoring is great, but it can be better!

recovery.philosophy: This recovery mechanism works, but it can be better!

everything.philosophy: Everything is good, but it can be better!
everything.delegation: Continuous, beneficent improvement across all systems

delegation_template.step_2: Identify improvements - 'But it can be better!'
delegation_template.step_5: Celebrate and iterate - 'Great! Now it can be even better!'

ILLUMINATION.philosophy: Illumination teaching is good, but it can be better!

MULTIMEDIA.philosophy: Multimedia pipeline is great, but it can be better!

CODE_QUALITY.philosophy: Code quality is good, but it can be better!

STORYTELLING.philosophy: Storytelling system is great, but it can be better!

ARCHITECTURE.philosophy: System architecture is good, but it can be better!

cursor_ide.philosophy: Cursor IDE integration is great, but it can be better!

connection_health.philosophy: Connection health monitoring is good, but it can be better!

retry_manager.philosophy: Retry manager works, but it can be better!

theme_integration.philosophy: It's good, but it can be better - and more fun!
theme_integration.description: Every improvement should enhance functionality AND add entertainment value
